subtitleGenerator.emptyState: Please upload a video or subtitle file first
subtitleGenerator.supportedFormats: Supports SRT, VTT, ASS, SSA formats
subtitleGenerator.insufficientBalanceDesc: Your Silicon Flow balance has been exhausted and AI generation cannot continue.
subtitleGenerator.visitToRecharge: Please visit Silicon Flow official website to recharge and continue:
subtitleGenerator.apiNotConfiguredDesc: Please configure model service in settings first
subtitleGenerator.selectFileHint: Please select a subtitle file to start generation

workArea.configureApiDesc: SiliconFlow API key is required to use AI generation feature
workArea.readyHint: Click "Batch Generate Synopsis" button on the left, AI will generate episode synopses for you

titleStyle.selectTitleStyleDesc: Select title generation style, single selection mode, will apply to all synopsis styles

summaryStyle.imitateMode: Imitation mode: AI will generate synopses imitating the style of your sample content
summaryStyle.multiStyleMode: You can select multiple styles to use together, AI will generate separate synopses for each style
summaryStyle.imitateSelectedDesc: Please go to "Generation Settings" tab to configure imitation sample content and generation count

videoAnalysis.aiTranscribeComplete: AI has completed audio transcription, you can view detailed results
videoAnalysis.srtContentDesc: Subtitle content generated from audio transcription
videoAnalysis.aiCorrectionDesc: Correct typos and homophones in key information, also fix grammar errors in dialogue, will not add information not in the original

results.aiGeneratedHint: AI-generated episode synopses are for reference only, please watch the corresponding video content and review before use.
results.forbiddenUpload: Direct upload to TMDB and other database platforms is forbidden.

generationSettings.title: Episode Synopsis Generation Settings
generationSettings.configureModelTip: Please configure model in Settings > Model Service > Use Cases for Episode Generation
generationSettings.noSummaryStyle: ⚠️ Please select at least one generation style

generationTab.aiModelSelectDesc: Select the AI model for generating episode synopses.
generationTab.noModels: No available models. Please configure in Model Service first.
generationTab.summaryLengthDesc: Set word count range. 30-400 chars recommended.
generationTab.customPromptDesc: Add special requirements or style guidance.
generationTab.generateCountDesc: Set how many synopsis versions to generate.
generationTab.sampleContentDesc: Enter a synopsis style sample for AI to imitate.
generationTab.samplePlaceholder: Enter the style you want AI to imitate...
generationTab.imitateHint: AI will imitate writing style without directly reusing sample vocabulary.

videoAnalysisTab.featureIntroDesc: Auto-extract audio from video and generate synopses. Supports YouTube, Bilibili, etc.
videoAnalysisTab.featureControlDesc: Enable or disable AI audio transcription
videoAnalysisTab.enableFeatureDesc: Generate synopses directly from video URL when enabled
videoAnalysisTab.speechModelDesc: Select the AI model for speech-to-text.
videoAnalysisTab.senseVoiceLarge: Highest accuracy, suitable for complex audio
videoAnalysisTab.cosyVoiceSeries: Lightweight and fast, suitable for clear audio
videoAnalysisTab.speechT5: General model, supports multiple speech tasks
videoAnalysisTab.noteApi: Audio transcription consumes significant API quota
videoAnalysisTab.noteQuality: Audio quality affects accuracy, use clear videos
videoAnalysisTab.noteLongVideo: Long videos take more time, please be patient
videoAnalysisTab.noteDisclaimer: Generated content is for reference only
videoAnalysisTab.guideStep3: Click Start Analysis, AI will auto-extract audio
videoAnalysisTab.guideStep4: View results and generate episode synopses
videoAnalysisTab.featureDisabledDesc: Generate synopses from video URL when enabled

resultsPanel.dragToRewrite: 💡 Drag to select text or click words to choose content for rewriting (Press ESC to cancel)

fileList.noFilesHint: Files will appear here after upload

emptyState.uploadOrVideoHint: Upload subtitle files or enter video link to generate episode titles and synopses
emptyState.step2UploadSrt: Upload SRT or VTT subtitle files
emptyState.supportedFormats: Supported formats: SRT, VTT, ASS, SSA
emptyState.unsupportedUrlFormat: Unsupported video URL format. Please use YouTube, Bilibili, etc.
